summary: Iteration 4 — Retest of single HIGH-priority backend issue from iteration 3 (revenue date range support). All 9 backend tests in test_improvements.py now PASS (9/9, 100%). The previously failing TestRevenueDateRange::test_revenue_with_date_range is fixed. Direct verification against preview backend confirms: date_from=2026-05-01 & date_to=2026-05-14 returns exactly 14 daily buckets labeled 01/05..14/05; default ?period=daily still returns 30 buckets; ?period=monthly still returns 12 buckets. Regression of iteration-3 improvements remains green (orders desc sort, date filter, discount_percent, customer_address persistence, inventory negative_stock_count/products, base64 product image CRUD).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py reports_revenue() now correctly accepts date_from/date_to (Optional[str]) and builds one bucket per day inclusive of both ends when both are provided — verified by 14-day range producing 14 buckets.
Server.py still ~1148 lines — consider splitting into routers (carry-over suggestion, non-blocking).

success_rate.backend: 9/9 (100%) on improvements suite; previously failing revenue date-range test now passes
success_rate.frontend: Not tested this iteration (backend-only retest as requested)

test_credentials: admin@banhbao.vn / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — login OK, JWT cookie returned.
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_ prefixed orders + one TEST_ product (auto-cleaned in test). No long-lived seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 iteration-3 improvements are now verified end-to-end on backend. Revenue endpoint contract: GET /api/reports/revenue accepts ?period=(daily|weekly|monthly) OR ?date_from=YYYY-MM-DD&date_to=YYYY-MM-DD (custom inclusive daily buckets). Labels use DD/MM format. Frontend Reports page wires reports-date-from/reports-date-to inputs to this — frontend wiring was already validated in iteration 3; with backend fix it will now render the correct range. Outstanding non-blocking item from iteration 3: add data-testid to NewOrder Combobox triggers (customer & product).
rca of the issue: Previous root cause was that /api/reports/revenue did not declare date_from/date_to params, so FastAPI dropped them and returned the default 30-day series. Fix added Optional[str] params and a new branch that iterates day-by-day from date_from to date_to inclusive (server.py lines 789-800+). Confirmed: response length = (date_to - date_from).days + 1 = 14 for 2026-05-01..2026-05-14.
